titleStmt.title: SII 9.487: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 487. (A.R. No. 180 of 1922.) ON THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE KALAHASTISVARA TEMPLE AT KALAHASTI, CHANDRAGIRI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1434, Āṅgirasa, Phālguṇa, śu. 5, corresponding to A.D. 1513 February 10, Thursday (not verifiable). It records that Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya made a gift of pearl neck-laces with a gold-string and precious stones, together with gold and silver plates, for ārati to the god Kāḷahastīśvara at Kāḷahasti.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1434 saṁdu mēle naḍeva Āṁgirsasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 5 lu
rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakriṣṇarāyamahārāyarū śrīkāḷahastīśvaradēvarige samarppista muttu 61 madhya
kusuri 2 sahā tūka 18Ø1 ge kaṁṭhamāle 1 mattaṁ kaṁṭhamāle 1 ke muttu 20 māṇika 18 nīla 2 tuṁbida kusuri 38 saha tūṁka 27Ø4
māle 1 Ubhayaṁ kaṇṭhamāle 2 madhyamāṇikavikkida saṁtardhāreya ciṁnada baṭṭalu 1 kke tūṁka 226 ciṁnada puruṣāmṛgada Ārati 1 giriyārati
keṁpu 24 pacce 5 sahā Ārati 1 beḷḷiya Ārati 25 yiṣṭanū taṁma sēveyāgi samarpisi cittayistarū maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī AvasaradaThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 9.487 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
